title: sdd/lematizacion-pep-opi/design
content:
# Design: lematizacion-pep-opi

## Technical Approach
Introduce `cargos_pep` + `entidades_publicas` tables + `PepCatalogService` with static in-request cache. `GeminiPromptBuilder::filtroPEP()` refactored to accept optional `?PepCatalogService` via constructor injection; builds dynamic 3-section prompt when positions exist, falls back to hardcoded text otherwise. `FiltroResultadoDTO` gains `entidadTipo` field.

## Key Architecture Decisions

### ADR-1: entidad_tipo → PHP BackedEnum + VARCHAR(10) CHECK
Rejected PG native ENUM (breaks SQLite tests). Chose PHP `EntidadTipo` enum backed by string + `VARCHAR(10)` column. Laravel CHECK constraint is silently ignored by SQLite — PHP layer enforces it.

### ADR-2: categoria → column on cargos_pep (not separate table)
Small stable taxonomy (6 categories). Column allows GROUP BY without joins. SHOULD requirement — normalization table out of scope.

### ADR-3: Cache → static array on PepCatalogService (in-request)
Rejected Laravel Cache (requires cache:clear in tests). Static array indexed by country code: 2 queries per country per process regardless of N records. Auto-cleared by RefreshDatabase (process isolation).

### ADR-4: PepCatalogService (new class) vs logic in GeminiPromptBuilder
GeminiPromptBuilder has zero DB deps; its tests extend plain PHPUnit\TestCase. Adding DB would break all existing unit tests. New PepCatalogService injected as nullable constructor dependency.

### ADR-5: Seeder data → PHP inline array
Matches DatosInicialesSeeder pattern. Idempotent via updateOrInsert.

## Files Created
- database/migrations: create_cargos_pep_table, create_entidades_publicas_table, add_gemini_entidad_tipo_to_resultados_scraping
- app/Enums/EntidadTipo.php
- app/Models/CargoPep.php (scopes: active, forCountry, byEntidadTipo)
- app/Models/EntidadPublica.php (scopes: active, forCountry)
- app/Services/Gemini/PepCatalogService.php
- database/seeders/CargosPepBoliviaSeeder.php (97 records)
- database/seeders/EntidadesPublicasBoliviaSeeder.php
- tests/Unit/Models/CargoPepTest.php
- tests/Unit/Models/EntidadPublicaTest.php
- tests/Unit/Services/PepCatalogServiceTest.php
- tests/Feature/Seeders/CargosPepBoliviaSeederTest.php

## Files Modified
- app/Services/Gemini/GeminiPromptBuilder.php (constructor injection, 3-section prompt)
- app/Services/Gemini/DTOs/FiltroResultadoDTO.php (add entidadTipo field)
- app/Providers/AppServiceProvider.php (bind PepCatalogService)
- database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php (register new seeders)
- tests/Unit/Gemini/GeminiPromptBuilderTest.php (add dynamic prompt tests)
- tests/Feature/Gemini/GeminiFiltroServiceTest.php (update fake responses)

## Open Questions
- Final classification of 97 Bolivia positions needs domain validation
- Separate EntidadesPublicasBoliviaSeeder vs merged (prefer separate)
- AppServiceProvider binding strategy (constructor injection preferred)
